goals.objective: Increase coverage for the highest-impact missing signals.
goals.reason: Hypothesis coverage or missing signal volume indicates weak evidence.
suggested_actions: Create VOI-ranked PIRs for the missing signals.
Require independent provenance before promoting observations to beliefs.
Re-run the same query after collection and compare coverage delta.
safeguards: Do not promote single-source claims above the belief threshold.
Keep collection within configured OSINT/provider boundaries.

goals.objective: Target uncertainty hotspots that can change the conclusion.
goals.reason: Several signals have low confidence and high learning value.
suggested_actions: Pass low-confidence signals through the CuriosityController VOI ranking.
Collect only signals whose expected information value crosses threshold.
safeguards: Stop collection when uncertainty reduction stalls across repeated cycles.

goals.objective: Target uncertainty hotspots that can change the conclusion.
goals.reason: Several signals have low confidence and high learning value.
suggested_actions: Pass low-confidence signals through the CuriosityController VOI ranking.
Collect only signals whose expected information value crosses threshold.
safeguards: Stop collection when uncertainty reduction stalls across repeated cycles.

goals.objective: Resolve contradictory evidence before raising confidence.
goals.reason: Contradictory claims or state signals need resolution.
suggested_actions: Run a counterfactual pass for each conflicting claim.
Ask the contrarian minister to explain which source would falsify the consensus.
Prefer newer, primary, and independently corroborated evidence.
safeguards: Do not discard minority evidence without provenance review.
Keep the final confidence penalty until contradictions shrink.

goals.objective: Improve reasoning discipline for degraded or low-quality stages.
goals.reason: Reasoning monitor or LLM degradation detected quality risks.
suggested_actions: Lower effort for easy stages and raise effort only for uncertain, high-stakes stages.
Add self-critique only when signal density or contradiction pressure warrants it.
Compare concise and expanded minister outputs on the same evidence pack.
safeguards: Do not increase token budgets globally without validation.

goals.objective: Accumulate enough resolved forecasts to learn safely.
goals.reason: Forecast archive needs more resolved cases before weight learning.
suggested_actions: Continue archiving forecasts with explicit horizon and outcome definition.
Resolve stale forecasts as ground truth becomes available.
safeguards: Do not auto-adjust from underpowered samples.

experiments.name: voi_collection_trial
experiments.method: Collect the top VOI PIRs, rebuild state, and compare hypothesis coverage.
experiments.expected_effect: Coverage increases and missing signals decrease.
experiments.success_criteria: Coverage rises by at least 0.10 or one critical PIR is resolved.
experiments.rollback_rule: Discard new beliefs that lack independent provenance.

experiments.name: active_learning_validation
experiments.method: Run a narrow before/after validation pass for the selected learning goal.
experiments.success_criteria: Measured metric moves in the desired direction without safety violations.
experiments.rollback_rule: Keep previous production behavior if validation fails.

experiments.name: reasoning_budget_comparison
experiments.method: Compare concise versus high-effort reasoning on the same evidence pack.
experiments.expected_effect: Higher signal density with no loss of grounding.
experiments.success_criteria: Reasoning quality score improves and hallucination flags do not rise.
experiments.rollback_rule: Return to previous effort policy if quality does not improve.

experiments.name: forecast_resolution_validation
experiments.method: Run a narrow before/after validation pass for the selected learning goal.
experiments.success_criteria: Measured metric moves in the desired direction without safety violations.
experiments.rollback_rule: Keep previous production behavior if validation fails.

experiments.name: counterfactual_contradiction_test
experiments.method: Run counterfactual and contrarian passes against the conflicting claims.
experiments.expected_effect: Contradiction count decreases or confidence is correctly penalized.
experiments.success_criteria: At least one contradiction is resolved with provenance.
experiments.rollback_rule: Keep contradiction penalty if no side is independently supported.
